translations.en: I have to smile right now.
translations.es: Ahora mismo no puedo evitar sonreír.
translations.fr: Je ne peux pas m'empêcher de sourire en ce moment.
translations.it: Non posso fare a meno di sorridere adesso.
translations.ru: Я сейчас не могу не улыбаться.
translations.he: אני לא יכולה שלא לחייך עכשיו.
translations.vi: Bây giờ tôi không thể không mỉm cười.
translations.ar: لا أستطيع إلا أن أبتسم الآن.
translations.nl: Ik kan nu niet anders dan glimlachen.
translations.uk: Я зараз не можу стримати усмішку.
translations.hi: मैं अभी मुस्कुराए बिना नहीं रह पा रही हूँ.
translations.pl: Teraz nie mogę się nie uśmiechać.
translations.el: Τώρα δεν μπορώ να μην χαμογελάσω.
translations.nb: Jeg klarer ikke å la være å smile akkurat nå.
translations.id: Sekarang aku nggak bisa menahan senyum.
translations.sv: Jag kan inte låta bli att le just nu.
translations.ro: Acum nu pot să nu zâmbesc.
translations.da: Jeg kan simpelthen ikke lade være med at smile lige nu.
translations.fi: En voi olla hymyilemättä juuri nyt.
translations.ja: 今、思わず笑みがこぼれる。

tokens.explanation: 1st person singular personal pronoun in nominative; subject of the clause.
Modal auxiliary, present (1st sg), expressing necessity/compulsion; selects a bare infinitive ('lächeln').
Temporal adverb indicating the current moment; modifies the verb phrase.
Bare infinitive lexical verb governed by the modal 'muss'.

translations.fr: Il ne peut s'empêcher de sourire.
translations.it: Non può fare a meno di sorridere.
translations.ru: Он просто не может не улыбаться.
translations.pt: Ele simplesmente não consegue deixar de sorrir.
translations.he: הוא פשוט לא יכול שלא לחייך.
translations.vi: Anh ấy không thể không mỉm cười.
translations.ar: هو فقط لا يستطيع إلا أن يبتسم.
translations.nl: Hij kan gewoon niet anders dan glimlachen.
translations.uk: Він просто не може не усміхатися.
translations.hi: वह बस मुस्कुराए बिना नहीं रह सकता.
translations.pl: On po prostu nie może się nie uśmiechać.
translations.el: Απλώς δεν μπορεί να μη χαμογελά.
translations.nb: Han klarer bare ikke å la være å smile.
translations.id: Dia cuma nggak bisa menahan senyum.
translations.sv: Han kan helt enkelt inte låta bli att le.
translations.ro: Pur și simplu nu poate să nu zâmbească.
translations.da: Han kan simpelthen ikke lade være med at smile.
translations.fi: Hän ei yksinkertaisesti pysty olemaan hymyilemättä.
translations.ja: 彼はただ微笑まずにはいられない。

tokens.explanation: 3rd person singular personal pronoun in nominative; subject of the clause.
Modal auxiliary, present (3rd sg), selecting a bare infinitive; expresses necessity or speaker stance.
Adverb/modal particle-like intensifier modifying the predicate; conveys 'simply/just'.
Bare infinitive lexical verb governed by the modal 'muss'.

translations.it: La tua battuta mi fa sorridere.
translations.ko: 네 농담에 나도 모르게 웃음이 나온다.
translations.pt: A tua piada me faz sorrir.
translations.vi: Câu đùa của bạn khiến tôi mỉm cười.
translations.hu: A vicced mosolyt csal az arcomra.
translations.hi: तुम्हारा मज़ाक मुझे मुस्कुराने पर मजबूर कर देता है.
translations.pl: Twój żart sprawia, że się uśmiecham.
translations.el: Το αστείο σου με κάνει να χαμογελώ.
translations.nb: Vitsen din får meg til å smile.
translations.sv: Ditt skämt får mig att le.
translations.ro: Gluma ta mă face să zâmbesc.
translations.cs: Tvoje vtip mě nutí se usmívat.
translations.da: Din vittighed får mig til at smile.
translations.ja: 君の冗談に思わず微笑んでしまう。

tokens.explanation: Possessive determiner agreeing with a masculine nominative singular noun ('Witz').
Common noun, masculine nominative singular; head of the subject noun phrase.
Finite main verb (3rd sg present), causative 'lassen'; takes an accusative object ('mich') and an infinitive complement ('lächeln').
1st person singular personal pronoun in accusative; object experiencing the caused action.
Bare infinitive complement of the causative verb 'lassen'.

translations.fr: Elle essaie de ne pas sourire.
translations.vi: Cô ấy cố không mỉm cười.
translations.hi: वह मुस्कुराने से खुद को रोकने की कोशिश कर रही है.
translations.nb: Hun prøver å la være å smile.
translations.da: Hun prøver at lade være med at smile.
translations.ja: 彼女は笑わないようにしている。

tokens.explanation: 3rd person singular personal pronoun in nominative; subject of the clause.
Finite main verb (3rd sg present) meaning 'to try'; governs a 'zu'-infinitive clause.
Negation particle; scopes over the infinitival verb phrase.
Infinitival marker used with the verb 'lächeln'.
Infinitive complement of 'versucht' with the marker 'zu'.
